global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, main message, and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options for travel.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'WayPoint' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Booking interface
elements.description: An abstract representation of a booking interface with various shapes indicating options and selections.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two circular shapes in a light color, adding a decorative touch to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A prominent rectangular shape in the center, suggesting a booking option or feature.

elements.label: Additional circular shape
elements.description: A smaller circular shape positioned near the center, complementing the other elements.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangle shape that serves as a background for the main text, enhancing visibility.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter' in a bold font, centrally positioned to grab attention.

elements.label: Sub-message
elements.description: The text 'Flexible booking options' in a smaller font, positioned below the main message.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: The text 'Try for free' in a bold font, encouraging user engagement.

elements.label: Ad headline
elements.description: The headline 'WayPoint' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, WayPoint logo, flexible booking options.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint, Fly smarter, Flexible booking options, Try for free
